marca.headline: Your journey starts here.
marca.subline: Track your applications and keep your profile close at hand.

login.title: Access my account
login.subtitle: Use your application e-mail and the temporary password we sent you.
login.dica: We sent a temporary password to your e-mail when you applied.
login.demo: Demo: use any e-mail and the temporary password {{senha}}.

troca.title: Create your password
troca.subtitle: This is your first access. Set a password of your own to continue.

recuperar.title: Recover access
recuperar.subtitle: Enter your account e-mail and we'll send you a link to reset your password.

enviado.title: Check your e-mail
enviado.subtitle: If there's an account for {{email}}, you'll receive a password reset link shortly.
enviado.subtitleGenerico: If there's an account, you'll receive a password reset link shortly.
enviado.dica: Didn't get it? Check your spam folder or resend in a few minutes.
enviado.demo: Demo: no real e-mail. Click below to simulate the link and reset the password.

redefinir.title: Reset password
redefinir.subtitle: Create a new password to sign in to your account.

redefinido.title: Password reset!
redefinido.subtitle: All set — your new password is now active.
redefinido.dica: You can now sign in to your account with the new password.

validacao.senhaRequisitos: The password doesn't meet all requirements.
